calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roger Jackson, Esq. 707-318-2994 for Plaintiff UNIFUND CCR, LLC
Michael Rivas 415-661-6320 Defendant in Pro Per

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MICHAEL RIVAS is Denied. Judgment Debtor Michael Rivas is to pay $20 Dollars per pay period.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
